findings.why: The <ul class="carousel"> at line 1189 has direct children <button class="slick-prev"> and <div class="slick-list draggable">, neither of which is <li>/<script>/<template>. Genuine violation.
Line 1 viewport meta reads maximum-scale=1, which is below the 5.0 threshold and blocks pinch-zoom for low-vision users. Genuine violation.

Enumerated all 47 <button> elements on snapshot line 8: every one has aria-label, aria-labelledby, title, or visible text content (e.g. aria-label="ログイン"/"保存"/"検索・絞り込み", visible text "イベントを開催する"/"リセット"/"すべて"). None lack an accessible name.

fp_classes: Engine flagged button-name-missing on a line containing dozens of buttons, but exhaustive enumeration shows every button on the cited line carries a valid accessible name (title/aria-label/aria-labelledby/visible text) — the underlying element the detector matched cannot be identified as unnamed; likely a miscount/mismatch against the wrong element on a heavily minified single-line SPA bundle.

findings.why: Flagged <h4 role="presentation" id="ot-bnr-hdr-id-1"> sits inside the OneTrust cookie banner. role=presentation strips heading semantics from the AT tree, so it cannot cause a real heading-order skip.
Header logo wraps only (empty alt) with no text, aria-label, or title anywhere in the link. Genuinely nameless link.
<a class="m-slider_link"> is completely empty; slide title/image are sibling elements outside the anchor, not descendants. No CSS/aria hiding present. Genuine violation.
Same carousel pattern: empty <a href="">, no descendant text/img/aria-label. Slide content lives in sibling divs, not inside the link.
Same carousel pattern: empty <a href="...jp/#page=1">, no descendant name-giving content. Genuine missing accessible name.
Same carousel pattern: empty <a href="https://mice.jnto.go.jp/">, title text is a sibling div, not inside the anchor. Genuine violation.
Same carousel pattern: empty <a href="...regional-support/">, no descendant content names it. Genuine violation.
Duplicate-prev slide's <a href=""> is empty and has no aria-hidden/display:none/visibility:hidden on it or ancestors at rest, so it is in the AT tree with no name.
wraps only . The text-bearing is a separate sibling link, not a descendant, so this image-only link has no accessible name.
Same pattern: <a class="img"> wraps empty-alt image only; the real title text is on a sibling <a>, not inside this link. Genuine violation.
Same pattern: <a class="img"> wraps empty-alt image only; title text sits in a separate sibling anchor. Genuine violation.
Same pattern: <a class="img"> wraps empty-alt image only; title text sits in a separate sibling anchor. Genuine violation.

fp_classes: input-label-missing FP class: checkboxes inside the JNTO article-filter widget (line 768) are each correctly wrapped in . The engine fails to detect wrapping

heading-level-skipped FP class: the flagged h4 belongs to a third-party OneTrust cookie-consent banner and carries role="presentation", which removes it from the accessibility-tree heading structure entirely. The engine's heading-order check does not account for role=presentation overriding native heading semantics.
